current.description: Critical database connection failure causing 500 errors on all employee-facing API endpoints
current.why: The Drizzle ORM database connection is failing or misconfigured, causing every endpoint that touches the database to return 500 errors. This blocks clock-in/out, schedule viewing, task assignment, and payroll — all LIVE features marked as highest priority.
unblocks: Task assignment and tracking becomes possible
All database-dependent API routes become functional
current.goal: Reliability of LIVE features — Clock-in/out, geofencing, scheduling, payroll reports, task assignment, and Clerk auth MUST work flawlessly

steps.description: Verify Drizzle database connection setup. Check that DATABASE_URL environment variable is properly accessed, Neon serverless connection pooling is configured correctly, and connection options include ssl: true for Neon. Add connection error handling and logging.
successCriteria: Database client exports successfully
Connection string is valid and references Replit Secrets
SSL configuration is present for Neon
Error handling logs connection failures

steps.description: Add proper error handling and logging to time-entries routes. Wrap database queries in try-catch blocks. Log specific error details (error type, message, stack trace) to help diagnose database connection issues. Return structured error responses.
successCriteria: All route handlers have try-catch blocks
Errors are logged with structured context
Errors return proper JSON shape: { success: false, error: { message, code } }
HTTP status codes match error types (500 for DB errors)

successCriteria: All route handlers have try-catch blocks

Errors return proper JSON shape
HTTP status codes match error types

steps.description: Add database connection health check at server startup. Test database connectivity before starting Express server. Log connection success or detailed failure. If connection fails, exit with clear error message rather than starting a broken server.
successCriteria: Health check runs before server.listen()
Connection test uses actual database query (SELECT 1)
Success is logged
Failure logs detailed error and exits with non-zero code

current.completionCriteria: All employee-facing API endpoints return proper responses (200 with data for successful auth, 401/403 for missing auth) instead of 500 errors. Database connection is stable and verified on server startup.

history.description: Shopify integration is completely broken — no OAuth flow, no webhook handlers, no sales data sync, blocking AI Staffing Optimizer, Midday Pulse, and Morning Whisper
history.why: Without Shopify integration, the app cannot access sales data. This blocks multiple high-priority AI features (AI Staffing Optimizer, Midday Pulse, Morning Whisper) and makes the app fundamentally incomplete for its core retail boutique use case. The crawl found no Shopify-related routes or webhook endpoints, and the codebase analysis shows missing OAuth flow, missing webhook handlers, and no sales sync infrastructure.
unblocks: AI Staffing Optimizer can analyze real sales patterns
Midday Pulse can compare actual vs. target sales
Morning Whisper can include yesterday's sales context
Daily Debrief can capture sales performance
Opening/Closing Checklist SOPs can reference sales targets
Manager dashboards can display real-time sales metrics
Pattern recognition can detect sales trends for SOP updates
evidenceFromCrawl: No /api/shopify/* routes found in crawl results
No Shopify OAuth callback endpoint detected
No webhook receiver endpoints for sales data
Scenario test 'Shopify Connect' failed with 'No OAuth flow found'
history.goal: Shopify Deep Sync completion — ensure real-time sales data streaming is bulletproof with retry logic, dead letter queues, and reconciliation checks

steps.description: Create Shopify OAuth flow with install, callback, and token storage. Use Shopify's official @shopify/shopify-api SDK. Store access tokens in new shopify_credentials table (shop domain, access token, scopes, installed_at timestamp). Handle authorization URL generation, token exchange, and scope validation (read_orders, read_products, read_customers minimum).
successCriteria: GET /api/shopify/install returns OAuth authorization URL
GET /api/shopify/callback?code=XXX&shop=YYY exchanges code for access token
Access token stored in shopify_credentials table
POST /api/shopify/install with valid shop domain initiates OAuth flow

steps.description: Create webhook receiver endpoints for orders/create, orders/updated, and products/update. Verify HMAC signatures using Shopify secret. Parse webhook payload, extract sales data (order_number, total_price, line_items, created_at, customer info), and insert into new shopify_orders table. Log webhook receipt in activity_log. Handle idempotency using webhook event_id to prevent duplicate processing.
successCriteria: POST /api/shopify/webhooks/orders accepts valid Shopify webhook
HMAC signature verification passes for authentic webhooks
Order data inserted into shopify_orders table
Duplicate webhooks detected and skipped (idempotency check)
Invalid HMAC returns 401 Unauthorized

steps.description: Define Drizzle schema for shopify_credentials (id, shop_domain, access_token, scopes, installed_at, updated_at) and shopify_orders (id, shop_domain, order_number, total_price_cents, currency, line_items_json, customer_id, customer_email, created_at, synced_at, webhook_event_id). Add indexes on order_number (unique constraint with shop_domain), created_at (for date range queries), and webhook_event_id (for idempotency checks).
successCriteria: Schema file compiles with zero TypeScript errors
Tables include all specified fields with correct types
Indexes defined for performance-critical queries
Foreign key relationships documented in comments

steps.description: Generate migration to create shopify_credentials and shopify_orders tables with proper constraints, indexes, and foreign keys. Use BIGINT for price_cents to avoid floating point. Use JSONB for line_items_json. Add unique constraint on (shop_domain, order_number) for shopify_orders. Add unique constraint on (shop_domain, webhook_event_id) for idempotency.
successCriteria: Migration runs without errors on local database
Tables created with correct columns and types
Unique constraints enforced (test duplicate insert fails)
Indexes present (check with \d shopify_orders in psql)

steps.description: Create ShopifySyncService with methods: fetchRecentOrders() (pulls last 7 days of orders via Shopify Admin API), syncOrder() (inserts/updates single order in DB), and reconcile() (compares Shopify order count vs. DB count, flags discrepancies). Use Shopify GraphQL Admin API for efficient queries. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for rate limit errors (429). Log all sync operations to activity_log.
successCriteria: fetchRecentOrders() returns array of orders from Shopify API
syncOrder() inserts new order into shopify_orders table
syncOrder() updates existing order if order_number already exists
reconcile() detects when DB has fewer orders than Shopify
Rate limit errors trigger exponential backoff retry (3 attempts max)

steps.description: Add GET /api/shopify/status endpoint returning { connected: boolean, shop_domain: string, last_sync: timestamp, orders_synced: number }. Add POST /api/shopify/sync-now endpoint to trigger manual reconciliation (admin-only, requires MANAGE_INTEGRATIONS permission). Update /health endpoint to include Shopify connection status.
successCriteria: GET /api/shopify/status returns correct connected status
POST /api/shopify/sync-now triggers ShopifySyncService.reconcile()
Admin users can call sync-now, non-admins get 403
/health endpoint includes shopify: { connected: boolean }

steps.description: Update AI Staffing Optimizer to query shopify_orders table for historical sales data instead of placeholder data. Calculate hourly sales patterns for last 30 days, group by day_of_week and hour. Feed this into Claude prompt as context for staffing recommendations. Handle edge case where no Shopify data exists yet (fallback to sensible defaults, log warning).
successCriteria: AI Staffing Optimizer queries shopify_orders table
Hourly sales aggregation calculates correctly (test with sample data)
Claude prompt includes actual sales patterns in context
Graceful fallback when shopify_orders table is empty
Recommendation quality improves (manually verify one output)

steps.description: Add Shopify integration card to Settings > Integrations page. Show connection status, shop domain (if connected), last sync timestamp, and orders synced count. Add 'Connect Shopify' button that redirects to /api/shopify/install. Add 'Disconnect' button (admin-only) that revokes access token and clears shopify_credentials. Add 'Sync Now' button (admin-only) that calls POST /api/shopify/sync-now and shows progress toast.
successCriteria: Integrations page displays Shopify connection status
Connect button redirects to Shopify OAuth flow
Disconnect button clears credentials and updates UI
Sync Now button triggers sync and shows success/error toast
Non-admin users cannot see Disconnect or Sync Now buttons

steps.description: Create WebhookManager service to auto-register Shopify webhooks on installation. After OAuth callback succeeds, call Shopify API to create webhooks for orders/create, orders/updated, products/update pointing to /api/shopify/webhooks/orders and /api/shopify/webhooks/products. Store webhook IDs in shopify_credentials table. Handle webhook registration failures gracefully (log error, allow manual retry).
successCriteria: Webhooks auto-register after successful OAuth installation
Webhook IDs stored in shopify_credentials.webhooks_json field
Registration failures logged to activity_log with ERROR level
Manual retry mechanism available via Settings UI or API endpoint

steps.description: Create scheduled reconciliation job (runs every 6 hours via cron or setInterval). Queries Shopify for order count in last 7 days, compares to shopify_orders table count. If discrepancy > 5%, triggers full sync via ShopifySyncService.fetchRecentOrders(). Logs reconciliation results to activity_log. Sends notification to owner if sync fails 3 times in a row (uses existing notification system).
successCriteria: Reconciliation job runs every 6 hours (verify with logs)
Discrepancies detected when order counts don't match
Full sync triggered when discrepancy threshold exceeded
Owner notified after 3 consecutive sync failures
Job can be manually triggered via /api/shopify/reconcile endpoint

history.completionCriteria: Shopify integration fully operational: OAuth flow completes successfully, webhooks receive and process orders, shopify_orders table populates with real data, AI Staffing Optimizer uses actual sales patterns, reconciliation job detects and fixes sync issues, integration health shows 'Shopify: CONNECTED', and Scenario test 'Shopify Connect' passes.
